nasb.text: Thus says the Lord of hosts, ‘I will punish Amalek for what he did to Israel, how he set himself against him on the way while he was coming up from Egypt.

esv.text: Thus says the Lord of hosts, ‘I have noted what Amalek did to Israel in opposing them on the way when they came up out of Egypt.

cnv.text: 萬軍之耶和華這樣說：‘以色列人從埃及上來的時候，亞瑪力人對他們所行的，在路上攻擊他們的事，我必要懲罰。

ccb.text: 万军之耶和华说，‘我要惩罚亚玛力人，因为在以色列人离开埃及的时候，他们与以色列人为敌。
